headMarkup:
<script>
    
    function getCaseIdFromUrl() {
        const url = window.location.href;
        let recordId = null;

        // Option 1: If Case ID is part of the path (e.g., /s/case/500xxxxxxxxxxxx/detail)
        const pathSegments = url.split('/');
        const caseIndex = pathSegments.indexOf('case');
        if (caseIndex > -1 && pathSegments.length > caseIndex + 1) {
            // Assuming the ID is the segment after 'case'
            recordId = pathSegments[caseIndex + 1];
            // Basic validation to check if it looks like a Salesforce ID (starts with 003 or 500)
            if (!recordId.startsWith('500') && !recordId.startsWith('003')) {
                recordId = null; // Not a valid Case ID
            }
        }

        // Option 2: If Case ID is a query parameter (e.g., /s/detail?id=500xxxxxxxxxxxx)
        if (!recordId) { // Only try this if not found in path
            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
            recordId = urlParams.get('id');
            // Basic validation
            if (recordId && !recordId.startsWith('500') && !recordId.startsWith('003')) {
                recordId = null;
            }
        }

        return recordId;
    }
    
	window.addEventListener(
		"onEmbeddedMessagingReady", () => {
            let currentCaseId = getCaseIdFromUrl();
            console.log('case id: '+currentCaseId);
			console.log(
				'Inside Messaging Ready Block'
			);
			/*let caseId = '500WC00000HL9BOYA1';
			console.log( 
				'User Id', 
				caseId
			);*/
			embeddedservice_bootstrap.prechatAPI.setHiddenPrechatFields(
				{
					'caseId' : currentCaseId
				}
			);
		}
	);
</script>
label: main
